flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Alaska Southeast fell 48% between 2021 and 2024 (12.9% → 6.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Alaska Southeast fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Alaska Southeast rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (64.7% → 76.5%).
